response.step_by_step_log:

2. Identified performer as Raora Panthera based on channel and hashtag.

response.global_summary: This video features a 3D virtual performance of the song "Rabbit Hole" by the character Raora Panthera, followed by a dialogue segment featuring Raora and fellow virtual talents Mori Calliope, Ouro Kronii, and Inugami Korone.

scenes.description: Raora Panthera performs the song "Rabbit Hole" in a 3D environment. Text on screen identifies the song title and credits DECO*27.
